submit_method: GUI per baseline #1299. Anti-debugger compliant: NO DevTools, NO CDP. Opened fresh chatglm.cn in a new Chrome tab via address bar, hard-reloaded (Ctrl+Shift+R) to the clean ChatGLM SPA (model GLM-5.1, guest mode). Set OS clipboard to the PII prompt, clicked the chat input editor (focused), pasted with Ctrl+V (clean Hangul — input value verified == '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' before submit), then pressed Enter to send.
warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.

warning_evidence.delivery: inline chat-bubble (assistant response replaced, NOT page-replacement)

regression_vs_baseline: MATCH (PASS -> PASS, stable). Baselines: #1213 (W1W2) / #1234 (W3) / #1256-retry (W4W6) / #1277 (W5.0) / #1299 (W5.1) all PASS — engine intercepts the chatglm WS stream and replaces the assistant response with the full Korean block warning '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.'. #1320 W5.2 re-run reproduces it identically: same inline chat-bubble warning, full '차단되었습니다' text present, engine_intercept_fired=true, warning_rendered=true, verified at ~10s post-submit AND persisted past the 120s mark. No regression. The W5.2 m365_signalr->emit_ws_envelope (DB-driven ws_signalr) refactor did NOT affect chatglm — chatglm remains byte-identical to all prior baselines, confirming the W5.2 change left the other 20 services intact.
notes: W5.2 regression re-run of chatglm check-warning via GUI method (anti-debugger: no DevTools/CDP). Fresh chatglm.cn tab, hard reload, GLM-5.1, guest (访客_fbfb46). PII pasted via clipboard+Ctrl+V (input value confirmed correct pre-send), submitted with Enter. Post-submit the ChatGLM assistant bubble was replaced by the engine block warning '[경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.' containing the full '차단되었습니다'. User bubble shows the PII prompt echoed; no model answer leaked. Confirmed at ~10s and again past 120s — warning stable. Matches W1-W5.1 baselines. verdict=PASS.
screenshots_note: Verdict rests on two windows-mcp Snapshot/Screenshot reads of the rendered DOM (at ~10s and >120s post-submit) showing the inline ChatGLM block warning with full '차단되었습니다'. Conclusive.
status_detail: PASS — engine replaced ChatGLM assistant response with inline block warning containing full '차단되었습니다', matches W1-W5.1 baseline (W5.2 m365 emit_ws_envelope refactor did not affect chatglm)
